title: Neon Relic
description: An interactive poster gallery where four sci-fi relics reshape the typography, lighting, materials, and sound.

prompt.objective: Build an editorial gallery where four relics transform the poster, stage, and sound.

mintAssets.brief: Four museum relics with distinct forms, materials, and stories.
PBR surfaces for the floor, plinths, and hardware.
Selection sounds and a subtle gallery ambience bed.

experience: Stage one orbitable relic as the dominant poster subject.
Use four selections to swap object, type, lighting, copy, and sound.
prompt.visualDirection: Monochrome editorial with acid-lime accents, oversized type, and hard shadows.

thumbnail.alt: Aether humanoid displayed in the Neon Relic editorial gallery

social.title: Neon Relic
social.description: Explore four sci-fi relics through a reactive fusion of 3D staging and experimental poster design.

image.alt: Neon Relic interactive science-fiction poster gallery
